title: Quran, Sura 101: Al-Qari'a
description: Sura 101 (Al-Qari'a: The Calamity) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 101 (Al-Qari'a: The Calamity) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: The Striking Calamity — what is the Striking Calamity? And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
